process {
   cpus = { 1      * task.attempt }
   memory = { 6.GB   * task.attempt }
   time = { 4.h    * task.attempt }
   errorStrategy = 'retry'
   maxRetries = 10
   maxErrors = '-1'
   withLabel:error_ignore {
      errorStrategy = 'ignore'
   }
   withLabel:error_retry {
      errorStrategy = 'retry'
      maxRetries = 2
   }
   withLabel:process_single {
      cpus = { 1                   }
      memory = { 6.GB * task.attempt }
      time = { 4.h  * task.attempt }
   }
   withLabel:process_low {
      cpus = { 2     * task.attempt }
      memory = { 12.GB * task.attempt }
      time = { 4.h   * task.attempt }
   }
   withLabel:process_medium {
      cpus = { 6     * task.attempt }
      memory = { 36.GB * task.attempt }
      time = { 8.h   * task.attempt }
   }
   withLabel:process_high {
      cpus = { 12    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 72.GB * task.attempt }
      time = { 16.h  * task.attempt }
   }
   withLabel:process_long {
      time = { 20.h  * task.attempt }
   }
   withLabel:process_high_memory {
      memory = { 200.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:'UNZIP.*|UNTAR.*|TABIX.*|BUILD_INTERVALS|CREATE_INTERVALS_BED|VCFTOOLS|BCFTOOLS.*|SAMTOOLS_INDEX' {
      cpus = { 1    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 1.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:FASTQC {
      cpus = { 4    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
      ext {
         args = { '--quiet' }
         when = { !(params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('fastqc')) }
      }
      publishDir = [[path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/fastqc/${meta.id}" }, mode:'copy', pattern:'*{html,zip}']]
   }
   withName:FASTP {
      cpus = { 12   * task.attempt }
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
      ext {
         args = '--disable_adapter_trimming      --split_by_lines 200000000 --length_required 15'
      }
      publishDir = [[path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/fastp/${meta.sample}" }, mode:'copy', pattern:'*.{html,json,log}'], [path:{ "${params.outdir}/preprocessing/" }, mode:'copy', pattern:'*.fastp.fastq.gz', saveAs:{ params.save_trimmed || params.save_split_fastqs ?  "fastp/${meta.sample}/${it}" : null }]]
   }
   withName:'BWAMEM1_MEM|BWAMEM2_MEM' {
      cpus = { 24    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 30.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:CNVKIT_BATCH {
      label = 'process_high'
      memory = { 36.GB * task.attempt }
      ext {
         args = { params.wes ? "--method hybrid --diagram --scatter" : "--method wgs --diagram --scatter" }
         when = { params.tools && params.tools.split(',').contains('cnvkit') }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/variant_calling/cnvkit/${meta.id}/" }, pattern:'*{bed,cnn,cnr,cns,pdf,png}']
   }
   withName:'GATK4_MARKDUPLICATES|GATK4SPARK_MARKDUPLICATES' {
      cpus = { 6     * task.attempt }
      memory = { 30.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:'GATK4_APPLYBQSR|GATK4SPARK_APPLYBQSR|GATK4_BASERECALIBRATOR|GATK4SPARK_BASERECALIBRATOR|GATK4_GATHERBQSRREPORTS' {
      cpus = { 2    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:MOSDEPTH {
      cpus = { 4    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
      ext {
         args = { !params.wes ? "-n --fast-mode --by 500" : ""}
         prefix = {
            if (params.tools && params.tools.split(',').contains('sentieon_dedup')) {
                "${meta.id}.dedup"
            } else if (params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('markduplicates')) {
                "${meta.id}.sorted"
            } else {
                "${meta.id}.md"
            }
        }
         when = { !(params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('mosdepth')) }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/mosdepth/${meta.id}" }, saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   }
   withName:'STRELKA.*|MANTA.*' {
      cpus = { 10   * task.attempt }
      memory = { 8.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:SAMTOOLS_CONVERT {
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:GATK4_MERGEVCFS {
      cpus = { 2    * task.attempt }
      memory = { 4.GB * task.attempt }
   }
   withName:MULTIQC {
      cpus = { 4     * task.attempt }
      memory = { 12.GB * task.attempt }
      ext {
         args = { params.multiqc_title ? "--title \"$params.multiqc_title\"" : '' }
      }
      publishDir = [path:{ "${params.outdir}/multiqc" }, mode:'copy', saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   }
   shell = 'bash\n\nset -e # Exit if a tool returns a non-zero status/exit code\nset -u # Treat unset variables and parameters as an error\nset -o pipefail # Returns the status of the last command to exit with a non-zero status or zero if all successfully execute\nset -C # No clobber - prevent output redirection from overwriting files.\n'
   publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/${task.process.tokenize(':')[-1].tokenize('_')[0].toLowerCase()}" }, saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   withName:'NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:CRAM_QC_NO_MD:SAMTOOLS_STATS' {
      ext {
         prefix = { "${meta.id}.sorted.cram" }
         when = { !(params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('samtools')) }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/samtools/${meta.id}" }, saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   }
   withName:'NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:SPRING_DECOMPRESS_.*' {
      ext {
         prefix = { "${spring.simpleName}" }
      }
      publishDir = [enabled:false]
   }
   withName:BCFTOOLS_STATS {
      ext {
         prefix = { vcf.baseName - ".vcf" }
         when = { !(params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('bcftools')) }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/bcftools/${meta.variantcaller}/${meta.id}/" }, saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   }
   withName:'VCFTOOLS_.*' {
      ext {
         prefix = { variant_file.baseName - ".vcf" }
         when = { !(params.skip_tools && params.skip_tools.split(',').contains('vcftools')) }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reports/vcftools/${meta.variantcaller}/${meta.id}/" }, saveAs:{ filename -> filename.equals('versions.yml') ? null : filename }]
   }
   withName:VCFTOOLS_TSTV_COUNT {
      ext {
         args = { '--TsTv-by-count' }
      }
   }
   withName:VCFTOOLS_TSTV_QUAL {
      ext {
         args = { '--TsTv-by-qual' }
      }
   }
   withName:VCFTOOLS_SUMMARY {
      ext {
         args = { '--FILTER-summary' }
      }
   }
   withName:SNPEFF_DOWNLOAD {
      ext {
         when = { params.tools && (params.tools.split(',').contains('snpeff') || params.tools.split(',').contains('merge')) }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ params.outdir_cache ? "${params.outdir_cache}/": "${params.outdir}/cache/" }]
   }
   withName:ENSEMBLVEP_DOWNLOAD {
      ext {
         when = { params.tools && (params.tools.split(',').contains('vep') || params.tools.split(',').contains('merge')) }
         args = { '--AUTO c --CONVERT --NO_BIOPERL --NO_HTSLIB --NO_TEST --NO_UPDATE' }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ params.outdir_cache ? "${params.outdir_cache}/": "${params.outdir}/cache/" }]
   }
   withName:BWAMEM1_INDEX {
      ext {
         when = { !params.bwa && params.step == "mapping" && (params.aligner == "bwa-mem" || params.aligner == "sentieon-bwamem" || params.aligner == "parabricks" )}
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reference" }, pattern:'bwa', saveAs:{ params.save_reference || params.build_only_index ? it : null }]
   }
   withName:BWAMEM2_INDEX {
      ext {
         when = { !params.bwamem2 && params.step == "mapping" && params.aligner == "bwa-mem2" }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reference" }, pattern:'bwamem2', saveAs:{ params.save_reference || params.build_only_index ? it : null }]
   }
   withName:CNVKIT_ANTITARGET {
      ext {
         when = { params.tools && params.tools.split(',').contains('cnvkit') }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reference" }, pattern:'*{bed}', saveAs:{ params.save_reference || params.build_only_index ? "cnvkit/${it}" : null }]
   }
   withName:CNVKIT_REFERENCE {
      ext {
         prefix = { 'cnvkit' }
         when = { params.tools && params.tools.split(',').contains('cnvkit') && !params.cnvkit_reference }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reference" }, pattern:'*{cnn}', saveAs:{ params.save_reference || params.build_only_index ? "cnvkit/${it}" : null }]
   }
   withName:DRAGMAP_HASHTABLE {
      ext {
         when = { !params.dragmap && params.step == "mapping" && params.aligner == "dragmap" }
      }
      publishDir = [mode:'copy', path:{ "${params.outdir}/reference" }, pattern:'dragmap', saveAs:{ params.save_reference || params.build_only_index ? it : null }]
   }
   withName:GATK4_CREATESEQUENCEDICTIONARY {
      ext {
         when = { !params.dict && params.step != "annotate" && params.step != "controlfreec" }

task.name: NFCORE_SAREK:PREPARE_INTERVALS:CREATE_INTERVALS_BED (wgs_calling_regions_noseconds.hg38.bed)
NFCORE_SAREK:PREPARE_INTERVALS:TABIX_BGZIPTABIX_INTERVAL_COMBINED (wgs_calling_regions_noseconds.hg38)
task.script:
bgzip  --threads 1 -c  wgs_calling_regions_noseconds.hg38.bed > wgs_calling_regions_noseconds.hg38.bed.gz
tabix --threads 1  wgs_calling_regions_noseconds.hg38.bed.gz

cat <<-END_VERSIONS > versions.yml
"NFCORE_SAREK:PREPARE_INTERVALS:TABIX_BGZIPTABIX_INTERVAL_COMBINED":
    tabix: $(echo $(tabix -h 2>&1) | sed 's/^.*Version: //; s/ .*$//')
END_VERSIONS

task.name: NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:FASTP (NA12878-lane_1)
task.script:
[ ! -f  NA12878-lane_1_1.fastq.gz ] && ln -sf NA12878_1.merged.fastq.gz NA12878-lane_1_1.fastq.gz
[ ! -f  NA12878-lane_1_2.fastq.gz ] && ln -sf NA12878_2.merged.fastq.gz NA12878-lane_1_2.fastq.gz
fastp \
    --in1 NA12878-lane_1_1.fastq.gz \
    --in2 NA12878-lane_1_2.fastq.gz \
    --out1 NA12878-lane_1_1.fastp.fastq.gz \
    --out2 NA12878-lane_1_2.fastp.fastq.gz \
    --json NA12878-lane_1.fastp.json \
    --html NA12878-lane_1.fastp.html \
     \
     \
     \
    --thread 12 \
    --detect_adapter_for_pe \
    --disable_adapter_trimming      --split_by_lines 200000000 --length_required 15 \
    2> >(tee NA12878-lane_1.fastp.log >&2)

cat <<-END_VERSIONS > versions.yml
"NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:FASTP":
    fastp: $(fastp --version 2>&1 | sed -e "s/fastp //g")
END_VERSIONS

task.name: NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:FASTQC (NA12878-lane_1)
task.script:
printf "%s %s\n" NA12878_1.merged.fastq.gz NA12878-lane_1_1.gz NA12878_2.merged.fastq.gz NA12878-lane_1_2.gz | while read old_name new_name; do
    [ -f "${new_name}" ] || ln -s $old_name $new_name
done

fastqc \
    --quiet \
    --threads 4 \
    --memory 1024 \
    NA12878-lane_1_1.gz NA12878-lane_1_2.gz

cat <<-END_VERSIONS > versions.yml
"NFCORE_SAREK:SAREK:FASTQC":
    fastqc: $( fastqc --version | sed '/FastQC v/!d; s/.*v//' )
END_VERSIONS

    -K 100000000 -Y -R "@RG\tID:null.NA12878.lane_1\tPU:lane_1\tSM:NA12878_NA12878\tLB:NA12878\tDS:s3://scidev-playground-us-east-1/igenomes/Homo_sapiens/GATK/GRCh38/Sequence/WholeGenomeFasta/Homo_sapiens_assembly38.fasta\tPL:ILLUMINA" \

    | samtools sort   --threads 24 -o NA12878.0001.bam -
